posts.author: Levinshizer (Dan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have 1 high level board I connect to several sub-boards.
For each sub board connected I created a mirror on my high level board for owner.
I want to have an automation which collect the different ownrs from the columns and put it in 1 selected column.

Would appriciate your help.
